item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
so comfortable
mmm hmm
love vice city but san andreas is the best
not much of a video call person
let's gooo
people love when you scan them
someone's never seen the Free Willy series
wait.. back up
you can do this with a lot of devices?
fire away.. if you want
that's a nope
i love weed and seth but yeah..
i knew it
we've all sold teeth at one point or another
what's the rarest fish i can invest in??
i think this is a real ad from way long ago
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: FFS people do better!! Support each other! FFS the world is hard enough without caring about each other's genders! Let people be who they were born to be, stop caring about their genitals!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Anime Expo Day 1 Vlog - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hello everyone! I was afk for some time as I was travelling to Los Angeles to attend Anime Expo 2024 ! I attend this event every year, but I thought that I would share my experience with you for once :D I thought it would be interesting for you to see what a day in my life as a professional cosplayer might look like at such events. On Day 1 I didn't have much planned so I visited my friend's meet ups then guested at my first after party of the week end (spoiler alert there is one every night hahaha) On Day 2 things will pick up a little as I got meet and greets, photoshoots and another after party guesting at night. Are you interested to see the second day? Have a good day all! Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Images of Note: it's dere
item.description:
Valid to eat fingers
Eva by Nightwish, Rose for Epona by Eluveitie, My Immortal by Evanescence, Life Eternal by Ghost, put more in the comments.
Life is boring, dress like a fucking JoJo Character.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii It's true
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii For legal reasons this is a joke
THIS
Hell yeah
Not from a neurotypical
This is what dreaming would look like if you could record it.
To be fair, if I saw a Pikachu only I could understand speaking to me with amnesia I think the fact it sounds like my Dad would be the least of my concerns.
You can get jail time for sleeping on a park bench but not for trying to overthrow the government in America. Also child marriage is legal in parts of America and is actively and openly being defended in State legislatures.
Chan eil fios agam mu sibhse, dh' thuigsinn mi a h-uile rud ann am bhidio sin.
Thor is amazing
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Got the skills
item.description: I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: A collection of old images and videos I have saved on my phone as a form of interacting with other people (Part 4)
item.description:
Hello everyone, I hope you are having a good day. I have been playing the elden ring dlc, so I think it's only fair to share some old elden ring/dark souls stuff I got on my phone. I haven't beaten it yet because I am playing it with my brother, and we are trying to explore everything we can without looking stuff up. I've been having fun with the dlc so far, though.
It's pretty accurate.
*Doubt*
All I need now is two friends.
Every time.
I heard you can control white people with cheese.
The only six pack I'll drink.
Everyone thinks I am a very calm and easygoing person.
Now for music.
*starting at you till you upvote*
Dino nuggets and Mac n cheese is so good.
I am not on any medication, and I am pretty sure life is raw dogging me.
A lot lot better.
The only reason I can think of.
Elden ring art tax.
item.dc:creator: Haitharg

item.title: Just bebe
item.description: Not my bebe. My cat would go Freddy Kruger on me if I attempted this. Some piano background music (sounds like Ludovico Einaudi) and happy senior kitty purrs at the end. Edit: The music is Andrea Vanzo's "Valzer d'Inverno". https://youtu.be/D5uc2mJi3Mg?feature=shared Thanks to @myotherusernameisalreadytaken !

item.title: Women tolerate me and fish ignore me
item.description: I know it's a little late in the year to be getting a new license, but this is actually a big accomplishment for me to have knocked out. Depression is a motherfucker. But I've slowly been getting out and hiking, and the plan is to do a backpacking/fishing trip in a few months.
item.dc:creator: digitalaaronscustoms

item.title: When I am at work and think about breaking the machine so everyone can go home for the day.
item.description: Just a thought that passes.
item.dc:creator: lsybarra

item.title: The Great Kilt
item.description: The great kilt also known as the belted plaid. The great kilt was a standard item of men's Highland dress from the late 16th century until the middle of the 18th century. It was also the precursor of the modern tailored kilt.
item.dc:creator: OneInThePinkTwoInTheStink

item.title: "Science: the non-partisan foundation of progress and innovation
item.dc:creator: twocurlsonepushup

item.title: Taking steps to be myself
item.description: There were signs that I either ignored or repressed and only recently came to light. So far only one person that knows me knows. Planning on telling my sister when she gets back from her vacation because she's likely to be my only ally from my family. I just wish I had realized all of this 10-15 years ago and not now but the second best time to plant a tree is today so here we go. The new journey starts here. FP Edit: Thank you all for the support and kind words. I'm reading all of the comments. I promise!
item.dc:creator: NegligentEpidemic

item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: Modern day America
item.description: What a fucking Joyride
item.dc:creator: FatSheamus

item.title: I was not prepared.
item.description: Went out with the neighbor's daughter after she had been hinting heavily for 3 years. We live rural so we decided to stay in at my place. I play some Zelda lofi remixes cause I'm such a boss but she has never played the games. This triggers something in me and I go off on a tangent, describing the game and it's Lore. In the middle of a sentence she just takes her shirt off. I don't miss a beat cause im a boss, I just ask her if she is hot and turn the ceiling fan on, because I'm on up to OOT. She sits there for another 90 mins just as interested as can be but I can tell she doesn't care. My last therapy appointment she mentioned nuerodivergent and it's making me think. "Am I autistic?" It would explain so much. Like maybe I'm "high functioning " But anyway that was just a moment in the 'date' we drink homemade wine and smoked weed and listened to music while I expounded in the pompotous of love. It was a goof night. She is coming around later. She is amazing. After 42 years I might have met a partner. Edit: date 2 was a success. We danced. I showed her internet shit she has never seen before. I showed her childish Gambino for the first time. She got cold. I tucked her in. She wants to see me again. I touched her thigh and made it jiggle. She laughed. I been waiting 30 years for this.
item.dc:creator: Dednotsleeping82

item.title: Ah yeah, us women really need to just put up and shut up! /S
item.description: Men, we need and appreciate your support and understanding with what we have to go through. I know a lot of it is just part of being a woman, but some understanding goes along way. When it comes to our rights we really need you to stand up and call out other men who think we're not equal! Personally I don't like the term feminism, I just think it's human rights to be treated the same way and have the same rights! In Ireland alone 1 in 2 women are sexually assaulted!! Men need to call out other men, because those 'men' don't listen to a women's opinion!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Red and black harness
item.description:
Here's one of the last few harnesses I made, first a quick one right after finishing
Tried getting a fancy picture with my new photo setup
And lastly few photos from a photoshoot at an abandoned hospital
Also in the picture bracelets I made
And the pupper tax with Bach
item.dc:creator: Affaltar
